name: Atom Ledger Box (Atomizer Steward)

subscribes.phase_c_note: subscription documented; runtime consumes when Atomizer Steward goes runnable in Phase B

subscribes.write_target: ATOMS.md (apply schema/protocol changes from DECs scoped to this ledger)

subscribes.filter: or(kind:atom_claimed, kind:atom_completed, kind:atom_blocked, kind:atom_abandoned, kind:atom_released, kind:atoms_authored)
subscribes.write_target: ATOMS.md/json (mirror state changes; sweep stale claims; surface PROB-closure-eligible)
subscribes.phase_c_note: this is the steward's primary signal stream once running

emits.phase_c_note: emit documented; currently fires through manual append, not bus
stale-claim sweep emits release events; manual today
when all atoms tied to a PROB's close-criteria complete, steward surfaces PROB for closure review (not auto-close)
if multiple atoms abandoned with the same root cause, steward surfaces a COMM lesson and flags the parent PROB for re-decomposition

guardrails: never auto-claim atoms — claim is always a deliberate agent decision
never auto-complete atoms — completion requires verification proof
never auto-close PROBs — closure is human-or-steward review, even when all atoms complete
stale-claim release (>24h with no in_progress_at) is the only automated mutation; even then, append a note explaining the release
proposed atoms always land in DRAFTS/ATOMIZATION/ first; never write directly to ATOMS.md without a review pass

phase_status.phase_a: complete (LEDGERS/ATOMS.md + .json shipped 2026-04-30; PROB-016 atomized as proof)
phase_status.phase_b: in_progress (this Box is the unified-pattern home; runnable form not yet wired; second PROB decomposition pass to add queue depth)
phase_status.phase_c: deferred (subscribes/emits documented but not consumed by router; runtime held per DEC-2026-04-29-013; /api/atoms/* endpoints + UI Atoms panel land at this phase)

related_ledgers: DECISIONS_LEDGER.md DEC-2026-04-29-001 (triad spine), DEC-2026-04-29-013 (runtime deferred), DEC-2026-04-29-015 (unified Box pattern), DEC-2026-04-30-003 (Atom Ledger architectural lock)
PHASE.md §4 (Phase B scope; this Box is one of the targets)
DEFINITION_OF_DONE.md §6 (Ledger Update Matrix; atoms inherit work-type gates)

history.event: Phase B — second unified Box created (after temporal_continuity 2026-04-29). Houses the Atomizer Steward sub-agent for Phase B promotion to runnable. Ledger files (ATOMS.md + .json) stay at LEDGERS/ — owned via path reference per DEC-2026-04-29-015. Subscribes/emits documented; runtime deferred to Phase C per DEC-2026-04-29-013.
